question: What are the current discounts available on Sujith?
answer: Sujith is currently running a 'Mega Summer Sale' with up to 70% off on electronics, fashion, and home appliances. Additionally, use code SAVE15 at checkout to get an extra 15% off on orders above ₹999. Offers are valid till the end of this month.

question: Does Sujith offer EMI options for expensive products?
answer: Yes! Sujith offers No-Cost EMI on products priced above ₹3,000, with tenures ranging from 3 to 24 months. EMI is available on leading credit cards and through buy-now-pay-later partners like ZestMoney and Bajaj Finserv. Select 'EMI' at checkout to view available options.

question: How can I find the best deals on Sujith?
answer: Visit the 'Deals' section on the Sujith homepage for today's best offers. You can also subscribe to our newsletter or follow @Sujith on Instagram and Twitter for flash sales and exclusive promo codes. The Sujith app also sends personalized deal notifications.

question: Is a product I'm looking for available in a different color or size?
answer: On the product page, available colors and sizes are listed as selectable options. If your preferred variant is shown as 'Out of Stock', click 'Notify Me' to receive an alert when it's back in stock. You can also check similar products suggested at the bottom of the page.

question: How do I use a coupon code?
answer: Add your items to the cart and proceed to checkout. On the 'Order Summary' page, you'll find a 'Apply Coupon' field. Enter your coupon code and click 'Apply' — the discount will be shown before you complete payment. Only one coupon code can be applied per order.

question: Are Sujith products authentic and original?
answer: Absolutely! Sujith sources products directly from brands and authorized distributors. All products listed on our platform come with brand warranty and authenticity guarantees. Products marked with a 'Sujith Certified Authentic' badge have gone through additional verification.

question: What is the Sujith Loyalty Rewards program?
answer: The Sujith Rewards program lets you earn 1 point for every ₹10 spent. Points can be redeemed for discounts on future purchases (100 points = ₹10 discount). Extra points are awarded during sale events. Track your points balance in 'My Account' > 'Rewards'.

question: Does Sujith have a price match guarantee?
answer: Yes! If you find the same product at a lower price on another major e-commerce platform within 7 days of purchase, contact us via chat or email with proof. We will match the price and refund the difference within 5 business days.

question: How do I know if a product is covered under warranty?
answer: Warranty details are listed on every product page under the 'Warranty & Returns' tab. Electronics typically carry a 1-year manufacturer warranty. Sujith also offers extended warranty plans for an additional cost, available at checkout or on the product page.

question: Are there any exclusive Sujith Premium membership deals?
answer: Yes! Sujith Premium members enjoy early access to sales (24 hours before general public), free shipping on all orders, exclusive member-only coupon codes, and priority customer support. Membership is available at ₹499/year or ₹99/month.

question: How can I check the specifications of a product?
answer: Full product specifications are listed under the 'Description & Specifications' section on the product page. You can compare up to 4 products side-by-side using the 'Compare' button. For any specific queries, use the 'Ask a Question' feature on the product page.

question: Is free shipping available on all orders?
answer: Sujith offers free shipping on orders above ₹499. For orders below ₹499, a shipping fee of ₹49 applies. Sujith Premium members enjoy free shipping on all orders regardless of order value. Express delivery options are available at an additional charge.
